day_0.check: HTTP 200 on all 6 URLs. Sitemap includes all 6. Canonical correct.

day_3.check: Check GSC URL Inspection for at least 1 URL showing 'URL is on Google'. No data change expected yet.

day_7.check: At least 3 of 6 URLs discovered by Google. No indexing expected yet. Check for crawl errors.

day_14.check: At least 2 of 6 URLs indexed. Check impressions. No change in discovered-not-indexed ratio.

day_21.check: At least 4 of 6 URLs indexed. Any impressions on any page. No cannibalization detected on Loan Calculator.

day_30.check: Indexing rate >= 50% (3+/6). Any impressions turning into clicks. Parent calculator impressions stable or growing.

success_criteria.by_day_30: Any impressions on any scenario page. 0 cannibalization detected.
success_criteria.stretch: At least 1 content click from any scenario page

failure_criteria.by_day_14: 0 URLs indexed → investigate quality or crawl issues
failure_criteria.by_day_21: <2 URLs indexed → scenario pages may not index well at current authority level
failure_criteria.by_day_30: 0 impressions → long-tail queries may have lower volume than estimated, or pages not ranking
failure_criteria.any_time: Discovered-not-indexed count increases by >50 → scenario pages may be adding to the problem

what_to_monitor.gsc_daily: Pull fresh GSC data via pipeline. Check page-level data for new URLs.
what_to_monitor.url_inspection_weekly: Check 1-2 URLs per week via GSC URL Inspection API (if token works).
what_to_monitor.sitemap: Verify sitemap includes all deployed URLs after each deploy.
what_to_monitor.parent_calculator: Track Loan Calculator impressions and position. Any decline = alert.

decision_points.day_21_evaluation: If 4+/6 indexed: SCALE — plan next 5-10 pages. If <2/6 indexed: HOLD — investigate and fix before more pages.
decision_points.day_30_evaluation: If any clicks + indexing >50%: APPROVE Phase 32.2 (next batch). If 0 clicks but indexing ok: extend measurement. If 0 indexing: pivot strategy.
